description:
The Nextcloud Desktop Client is a tool to synchronize files from Nextcloud Server with your computer.

Use the desktop clients to keep your files synchronized between your Nextcloud server and your desktop.
Select one or more directories on your local machine and always have access to your latest files wherever you are.
What's Changed
- [stable-3.16] revert: remove duplicated code when copying legacy config to new path. by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8233
- [stable-3.16] fix(migration): migrate general network settings. by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8308
- [stable-3.16] fix(delete): fix move to trash in read-only folders by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8312
- [stable-3.16] fix(AppImage): bundle client translations by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8313
- [stable-3.16] fix(gui): handle invalid file name edge case on Windows by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8314
- [stable-3.16] Bugfix/version windows integration improve install by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8315
- [stable-3.16] fix(appimage): move VFS plugins to AppDir by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8317
- [stable-3.16] feat(mac-crafter): retry code-signing attempts by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8316
- [stable-3.16] fix(rename): avoid failing hard when rename is rejected by server by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8323
- [stable-3.16] fix(readonly): enable MOVE rollback when folder is read-only by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8324
- [stable-3.16] fix(readonly): apply ACL also to files inside read-only folders by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8325
- [stable-3.16] Bugfix/windows regressions by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8322
- [stable-3.16] fix(readonly): use native separator in paths before calling windows API by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8326
- [stable-3.16] fix(permissions): handle properly CanRead permission from server by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8327
- [stable-3.16] fix(filesystem): only change folder permissions if required by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8328
- [stable-3.16] fix(lockfilejobs): ensure using correct file path by @backportbot in nextcloud/desktop#8332
Full Changelog: nextcloud/desktop@v3.16.4...v3.16.5
